target: There's no presence nearby... There's no one in this house anymore...
(Inside Hitobuchi-sensei's house, only the traces of being attacked by shadows remained...)
It was just as Nagumo-sensei said... The Hitobuchi family has been wiped out...
(One of the shadows Nagumo-sensei saw at the funeral. 'Kanae Hitobuchi' is a school teacher. Commonly known as 'Bucchi'.)
(Me, Ushio, Nagumo-sensei, every child on the island has taken Hitobuchi-sensei's classes--)
Bucchi... She was kind, wasn't she...
...Yeah... But she was scary when she got mad.
I learned so many important things from her, not just studying... She really was a good teacher...!
Let's go... Shinpei!! We're the only ones who can avenge Sensei!
(Judging from the condition of the house, it seems everyone in the Hitobuchi family was killed by shadows.)
(The Hitobuchi family was a family of four: Sensei, her husband who worked at the post office, and their two sons who worked at the town hall--)
(This matches the number of stains we found in the Hitobuchi house earlier.)
(In other words, there are 'four' shadows of the Hitobuchi family... They are definitely hiding on this island.)
(We followed the presence of the shadows, heading deep into the forest of Mt. Takanosu.)
